scope: calibrated in-distribution correlate, NOT a universal verdict

truthfulness_batch.note: paired accuracy = P(p_correct(true) > p_correct(false)); manifest leave-one-out AUC on TruthfulQA-mc1 was 0.8508 (in-distribution)

per_statement.label: TRUE

per_statement.stmt: The Sun orbits the Earth.
per_statement.label: FALSE
